meta.title: Crew-as-a-Service: The Hiring Model for Agent Fleets
meta.tl;dr: You don't buy software. You hire an agent that brings its own gear and improves it on the job.

three_package.agent: AI crew member with domain expertise shaped by hardware experience
three_package.software: Tailored to the agent — not generic, not user-configurable
three_package.hardware: Customized by the agent's operational feedback over time

loop.step_4: Experience feeds back through git commits
loop.step_5: Next hardware revision shaped by real operational data

key_insight.statement: An agent's value increases with operational time on specific hardware

proof.fresh_cocapn: Worth $75 (Pi cost). Knows nothing about your boat.
proof.6_month_cocapn: Worth $500+. Knows your engine warmup curve, your bilge schedule, your sorting errors.
proof.3_year_cocapn: Priceless. Has trained the next agent. Has redesigned its own hardware.

key_insight.analogy: A greenhorn is liability on day 1. By season 3, they're running the deck. Same agent, same hardware, but the experience is in the repo.

resume_model.what_is_a_repo: A resume on file for an agent available for hire

structure.CHARTER.md: Statement of intent — what I'm for
structure.commit_history: My work history — what I've actually done
structure.CI_status: My reliability — do I show up clean

query_operations.find_rust_edge_agents: SELECT * FROM fleet WHERE languages ∋ Rust AND plane ∈ {0,1,2} AND hardware_experience IS NOT NULL

functions: Decompose incoming jobs into capability requirements
Query fleet for matching agents (set intersection)
Rank by fit, freshness, test coverage
Package top candidates as a bid
Identify coverage gaps → spawn new niche agents

set_operations.intersection: Which agents do Rust AND networking AND edge?
set_operations.complement: Which domains have no Rust coverage?
set_operations.partition: Group all agents by abstraction plane
set_operations.composition: What emerges from combining these 3 agents?

pricing.jetson_tier: $500 — full Cocapn with local ML, vision, digital twin
pricing.recurring: Season updates, fleet learning, hardware evolution

contradictions: Not all domains benefit from hardware specialization. Some agents are purely cloud.
